guide:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Professor Pansoof sends you to Tailor Nokar for a Student's Uniform. Return to Professor Pansoof for your experience to level 2.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Professor Pansoof sends you to see Spiritmaster Hansel to bind. Then see Coachman Rikzar who will sign you up on the stable list, return to Professor Pansoof for your experience.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Pansoof wants you to go out and hunt snakes and bring back two ruined snake scales. Your reward is experience and a Scroll of Arcand Bindings.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Professor Cranslip  
Cranslip will make you a new staff if you bring him the following items:  
- Bottle - Purchase from Grocer Guzzlewugs  
- Small Gear - Purchase from Merchant Samwe  
- Ruined Bat Wings  

Your reward is experience and a Wizard's Staff.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Professor Panslip  
Panslip sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW), you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Professor Pansoof asks you to buy three gear wheels and bring them to Zarene Earblower in Rivervale. Buy the gear wheels from Merchant Samwe and then speak to Waysender Glowbap who will teleport you to Rivervale. Give the gears to Zarene and she will ask you to help out Zale Earblower. Zale asks you to help get back a bag that was stolen by thieves. Head into Misty Thicket and find the Goblin Burglers. They are northwest of the city gate. They will eventually drop a worn bag. Bring this back to Zale. Then go to Waysender Windfoot to teleport back to Klick'Anon and talk to Pansoof for your reward. You will receive a Scroll of Burning Flame and Pansoof's Pantaloons.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Pansoof asks you to go help out Hosco Brixwak at the Dam. Hosco asks you to get him the items he needs to fix the dam. He sends you to Watchman Jenkins at the southeast gate who tells you about a strange clockwork he saw. The Strange Clockwork can be found to the south and it drops a Lava Vent Piece. Bring that back to Brixwak.  
He next wants you to go talk with Darela Lightfoot, who lives in Kara Village and get some Pixie Dust. She will give it to you if you first bring her a Mindhipper Venom Sac. This drops from either Mindwhipper Drones or Frenzied Hunter Wasps, both of which spawn to the south of the village. Return with it and she will give you the Pixie Dust.  
Bring the dust back to Hosco and he will give you a Mechanastaff and a note for Pansoof. Return to Pansoof for experience.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Professor Cranslip  
Talk to Prof. Cranslip to start the quest. She tells you to go get a master gear from a Model II PE clockwork east of Klick'Anon. Go out the east gate and go southeast into Rogue Clockwork zone. There should be a tall mountain range there. Go around it to the south and then go east toward the clockwork town, you should see the Model II PE's walking around. The Model II PE's are level 15. Loot a master gear from one and return to Prof. Cranslip.  
Give Prof. Cranslip the master gear. She then says to find Allister Fobblegrob or Psova Brinkbar east near clockworks. Go out east gate and go east along left wall until you get to a collapsed mine. Psova Brinkbar is near the mine in northwest Rogue Clockwork zone. She wants you to get 2 drained clockwork batteries from the clockwork rats and spiders near clockwork town. Go southeast from mine to the mountain. Climb around the mountain by going south, you will then see the clockwork town to the east. The rat and spider clockworks are level 13 to 15. Loot 2 drained clockwork batteries from them and return to Psova. Give her the batteries and she then says to find Camwe Gearcrafter and get her balance. Go south from the mine. Camwe Gearcrafter is in southwest Rogue Clockwork zone near a bunch of glowing green rocks. Camwe Gearcrafter is level 16. Loot Camwe's balance and return to Psova. Give Psova the balance and you get 550,698 exp and the spell scroll Element Guard.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Professor Cranslip  
Talk to Prof. Cranslip to start the quest. She sends you out to talk to Psova again. Psova wants you to get armor from patrol drone XJ5. Go to the entrance of clockwork town in Rogue Clockwork zone and wait for the patrol drone XJ5 to come out of town so you don't have everybody in town jumping on you. Wait until it comes all the way out and then attack it and loot the armor. The patrol drone XJ5 cons yellow at 16.  
Return to Psova and give her the armor. She then tells you to look for Allister Fobblegrop and get his book titled Autonomy Theory, and to look southwest toward the haunted cemetery south of Klick'Anon. Go southwest into Collinridge Cemetery zone. Outside of the big building in the north part of the zone is a stone marker. Target the marker and read it. Choose look for the book and you will get the Autonomy Theory book. I recommend that you put on invis before you go into the Collinridge zone, you can read the stone marker while invisible.  
Return to Psova and give her the book. She then asks you to take a note (Psova's battle plans) to Zale Earblower in Rivervale.  
Coach to Bobble By Water then to Rivervale. If you did not register at the Bobble By Water coach and Rivervale coach you will have to walk. Give the battle plans to Zale Earblower near the windmill at the other exit from Rivervale across the lake from where you came in from the coach. Zale says he needs time to read the battle plans and to go talk to his wife Zarene.  
Zarene Earblower is in the northwest part of town in the building north of the bank. Zarene tells you to get sap from a Kithicor Myconid and tells you to look in North Kithicor east of Loreth Kith.  
Go out the exit next to where Zale is standing and follow the road northeast, at an intersection go north or east you want to get to the central to north part of North Kithicor zone. You will then come to a village. The Kithicor Myconid is just to the east of the village. Attack and loot a Kithicor Myconid sap. The Kithicor Myconid cons yellow at 16.  
Return to Rivervale and give Zarene the sap. She gives you the Shocking Gaze spell scroll and tells you to go back and talk to Zale. Go back to Zale and talk to him. He gives you back the battle plans and tells you to give the plans back to who wrote them.  
Coach to Bobble By Water then to Klick'Anon, or use return home spell if you are bound in Klick'Anon. Then return to Psova and give her the battle plans. She gives you Psova's Robe and says to return to your professor. Go and talk to Prof. Pansoof and you will get 883,971 exp.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
1. Talk to Professor Pansoof in Klick'Anon, he sends you to Snafitzer. To find Snafitzer: From Klick, coach to Fay, then coach to Teth. If you don't have Teth coach, just run/swim from Fay coach west till you see an Elf tree-city (Teth) head towards it, once at Teth look for the only ground building, that is the coach. From Teth coach, head directly west from the coach till you see a huge mountain telescope on top (Gnome Observatory). Snafitzer's tree-house (Snafitzer's House (SW)) is on the west side of that mountain.  
2. Snafitzer sends you to Mordheim to buy some Mordheim Ore from Merchant Brant at a cost of 640 tunar. Merchant Brant is near the coach, in a building and upstairs. Mordheim coach is outside of the city's main entrance and past the quarry. Return to Snafitzer.  
3. Snafitzer sends you to kill Prophet Grug (CONs Yel) for his Boot! Grug is located in a cave at The Druk (C). Enter the tunnel, head down to the bottom. As you make your way through the tunnels and you begin to head UP again, you went too far! In fact, when you reach the first ramp heading up, stop, look to the right, you will see a ramp going down, at the bottom of that ramp is Grug. Return back to Snafitzer. Return to Professor Pansoof.  
4. Pansoof sends you to Psova. To find Psova; from Klick coach, head out the west exit. Once outside of the west exit, make a sharp left (north) turn along the mountains, soon, you will see a mineshaft, Psova roams near it!  
5. Psova wants Hollow Shaft from Barley Sowser in Bobble-By-Water. To find Barley; from BBW coach make your way to the most western part of BBW, Barley is in farming field.  
7. Barley wants a Wailing Root. To find this Wailing Root; From Barley, head west to the Green Rift zone, when you come upon the rift canyon head north, soon in the distance you will see a very large tree (the Wailing Tree). At the bottom of the tree is a tunnel entrance, enter it. Inside the tunnels are lots of undead mobs (CONs from LB to yellow at 20), most don't see invis, but Root Spirits does! As you enter the tunnel make a left turn, make your way past two or three large rooms, in the second or third room you will get a POPUP message, pluck the root and it's in your inventory. FYI; festering roots from Root Spirit is not what you want! You may need to bring help the mobs swarm and have large agro ranges. Inside the tunnels, there are no safe places to die and Rez back too. Return to Barley. Return to Psova.  
8. Psova sends you to the Clock Work Village to kill Unit 1 (CONs yel). To Find Clock Work Village; from Klick coach, head out the east exit, head east till you reach a large mountain. Head up the side of the mountain till you can go no further, then run south along the mountain, all the while trying to turn east again, soon you will be able to head east, do so, as soon as you do, head north along the mountain, you will see the Clock Work Village. To find Unit 1; From the entrance to Clock Work Village, head diagonally to your left, go to the last hut on the left in the corner, this is where Unit 1 will be. Unit 1 is triggered spawn and may have a placeholder, which will be the mob in the center and in the back. If you have invis, you can reach the hut with no trouble. Also, if you see yourself dying, run behind that hut in the corner and die there, then you can rez back safely! Most mobs are LB. Loot the Specs from Unit 1. Return to Psova. Return to Pansoof.  
9. Speak to Professor Pansoof again and you will receive the choice of one of two spells with an item, which are Burning Clash (DD and Low Aggro) with a 2h Staff or Mental Focus (Power regeneration over time) with 1h Wand.
